heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3774 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter not more than $75,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2025 through 2029.
notes: Amendments2024— substituted “2025 through 2029” for “2019 through 2023”.Pub. L. 118–1592019— substituted “2019 through 2023” for “2006 through 2011”.Pub. L. 116–9
amendments: Amendments2024— substituted “2025 through 2029” for “2019 through 2023”.Pub. L. 118–1592019— substituted “2019 through 2023” for “2006 through 2011”.Pub. L. 116–9
